backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Beast Clipping backend, defining data types (UserProfile, VideoClip, ScheduledUpload, etc.) and integrating authorization, blob storage, and HTTP outcall mixins for a YouTube clip management platform.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature IDs and titles to the specific frontend files and components involved, along with test IDs and confidence levels for features like YouTube channel connection status, clip download, and admin user management.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document providing short descriptions of each frontend source file, summarizing the purpose and key behaviors of components, hooks, pages, and config files in the React frontend.
frontend/.env: Frontend environment file containing the Vite Google OAuth Client ID used for YouTube authentication.
frontend/.env.example: Template environment file with a step-by-step guide for obtaining and configuring a Google OAuth Client ID, including troubleshooting tips for common OAuth errors.
frontend/.gitignore: Standard gitignore for a Vite/Node frontend project, excluding node_modules, build output, editor files, and environment variable files.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file importing Tailwind directives and defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, primary, sidebar, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite React app, setting the page title to 'Beast Clipping' and mounting the React app via the root div and main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes, React Query client, authentication guards, system status checks (showing PausedScreen for non-admins), and a login page with Internet Identity integration.
frontend/src/components/AccountStatusErr: Displays a full-screen error page for banned or suspended users, showing relevant messaging and a logout button that clears identity and query cache.
frontend/src/components/AccountStatusGua: Wraps children with an authentication status check, showing a loading spinner while fetching the user profile and rendering AccountStatusErrorScreen if the user is banned or suspended.
frontend/src/components/ActivityLogTable: Renders a searchable, scrollable table of activity logs showing user ID, action, and timestamp, with loading skeletons and a filter input.
Displays a debug panel for admin authentication info including admin principals, hashmap size, and initialization status, with copy-to-clipboard and refresh functionality.
frontend/src/components/AdminErrorBounda: A React class-based error boundary that catches errors in the admin panel and displays the error message, stack trace, and options to retry or navigate home.
frontend/src/components/AdminList.tsx: Fetches and displays a list of admin principals with their short user IDs, handling loading and error states with skeletons and alerts.
Provides a form to add a new admin by principal ID using the useAddAdmin mutation, and renders the AdminList component below it.
frontend/src/components/AdminMessaging.t: A form component that allows admins to send messages to users by entering a recipient's principal ID and message body, using a mutation to call the backend `sendMessage` actor method.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: The main admin dashboard component that renders collapsible sections for analytics, user management, activity logs, messaging, feedback, and system controls, gated behind an admin/owner role check.
frontend/src/components/AdminPasswordInp: An empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/AppAnalytics.tsx: Displays admin analytics including stat cards for total clips, trending clips, and click interactions, plus a bar chart of videos uploaded per hour over the last 24 hours.
frontend/src/components/AppShell.tsx: A layout wrapper that renders a desktop sidebar navigation, a scrollable main content area, and a mobile bottom navigation bar.
frontend/src/components/BottomNavigation: A fixed mobile bottom navigation bar that filters nav items based on the user's role and includes a feedback button that opens a FeedbackModal.
frontend/src/components/CaptionEditor.ts: A textarea-based caption editor with a 500-character limit, emoji quick-insert buttons, copy-to-clipboard functionality, and a tooltip showing markdown/formatting hints.
frontend/src/components/ChannelConnectio: Displays the YouTube channel connection status and renders either a connected badge or a connect button that triggers the `connectChannel` action from the `useYouTubeChannel` hook.
frontend/src/components/ClipCard.tsx: Renders a single video clip card with thumbnail, viral score badge, timestamp display, and action buttons for downloading, posting to YouTube, and deleting. Includes an admin view that shows the owner's principal ID with a copy button.
frontend/src/components/ClipList.tsx: Fetches and displays a list of ClipCard components using the useClips hook, handling loading, error, and empty states. Supports optional clip selection callback.
Displays either AI-generated clip suggestions or trending clips ranked by viral potential, allowing users to select a suggestion to populate clip creation fields.
frontend/src/components/ClipTimestampCon: Provides a form for setting start/end timestamps and a title to create and save a video clip, with support for pre-filling fields from AI suggestions.
frontend/src/components/FeedbackModal.ts: A dialog modal for submitting user feedback as either a feature request or bug report, with title and description fields and validation.
frontend/src/components/FeedbackSubmissi: Displays a list of all feedback submissions with type badges, submitter info, and delete functionality, intended for admin use.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: A passthrough layout wrapper component that simply renders its children, kept for compatibility while actual layout is handled by AppShell.
frontend/src/components/PausedScreen.tsx: Displays a full-screen maintenance/paused state UI with a 'Check Again' button that invalidates the systemStatus query to re-check app availability.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: A modal dialog for new users to set up their profile by entering a display name and optionally uploading a profile picture, then saving via the saveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/SideNavigation.t: Renders the main sidebar navigation with role-filtered nav items, user profile display, logout functionality, and a feedback modal trigger.
frontend/src/components/SystemControls.t: Admin UI component for controlling system state (pause/resume, restart, shutdown) with confirmation dialogs and real-time status display.
Sidebar widget that displays the top 5 trending clips with rank badges and trending scores, fetched via useAdminStats.
frontend/src/components/UserIdDisplay.ts: Displays the current user's short user ID and full principal ID with copy-to-clipboard buttons for each.
frontend/src/components/UserMessages.tsx: Shows a user's received admin messages with a detail view and inline reply functionality, polling every 15 seconds for new messages.
frontend/src/components/UserRoleBadge.ts: Renders a styled badge displaying a user's role (owner, admin, user, friend) with an appropriate icon and color scheme, supporting three size variants.
frontend/src/components/UserStatusManage: Admin UI component that lists all users in a searchable, selectable table and allows bulk deletion of clips, as well as per-user status and role changes.
frontend/src/components/VerticalClipPrev: Displays a 9:16 vertical preview card for a video clip, showing its YouTube thumbnail, play overlay, viral score badge, duration, and time range.
frontend/src/components/VideoUrlForm.tsx: Form component that validates and loads a YouTube URL, then optionally triggers AI clip generation for the extracted video ID.
Displays a color-coded badge indicating a clip's viral potential score with an icon and optional label, supporting three size variants.
frontend/src/components/YouTubePlayer.ts: Renders a responsive 16:9 YouTube iframe embed for a given video ID inside a Card component.
frontend/src/hooks/useActivityLogs.ts: React Query hook that fetches activity logs from the backend every 15 seconds, enabled only for authenticated owner/admin users.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAddAdmin.ts: Mutation hook that calls the backend to add a new admin by user ID and invalidates admin-related queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminDebug.ts: React Query hook that fetches debug information about the current user's admin status and returns placeholder data for backend fields not yet implemented.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminList.ts: React Query hook that fetches the list of admin principals from the backend, enabled only when the actor is ready.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminStats.ts: React Query hook that fetches total clip count and trending clip analytics from the backend, returning combined loading and error states.
React Query mutation hook that calls the backend to auto-generate clip suggestions for a video, falling back to mock AI-generated suggestions if the backend returns none.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipCreation.ts: React Query mutation hook that saves a new video clip to the backend, calculating a viral potential score based on clip duration and title before submission.
frontend/src/hooks/useClips.ts: Hook that fetches all clips for the authenticated user and provides a delete mutation with toast notifications and loading state tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipTimestamps.ts: Stateful hook managing start/end timestamp inputs (minutes and seconds), with helpers for validation, formatting, and converting to/from total seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useContentEntries.ts: Set of React Query hooks for fetching, creating, updating, and deleting content entries via the backend actor, each with toast feedback on success or error.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeleteFeedback.ts: React Query mutation hook that deletes a feedback submission by ID and invalidates the feedbackSubmissions query cache with toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useDownloadClip.ts: React Query mutation hook that generates a download URL for a video clip and attempts a fetch-based download, falling back to opening the URL in a new tab if CORS blocks it.
frontend/src/hooks/useFeedbackSubmission: React Query hook that fetches all feedback submissions from the backend actor when the actor is available.
frontend/src/hooks/useFeedbackSubmit.ts: React Query mutation hook that submits user feedback (type, title, description) to the backend and invalidates the submissions cache with toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetOwnRole.ts: React Query hook that fetches the authenticated user's role from the backend, returning null on error instead of throwing, with combined loading state.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook implementing Internet Identity authentication via DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing identity, login/clear functions, and login status states.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsOwner.ts: React Query hook that calls the backend `isCallerAdmin()` to determine if the current Internet Identity user is an admin/owner, with verbose debug logging on state changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useMyMessages.ts: React Query hook that fetches the current user's admin messages from the backend, polling every 30 seconds, keyed by a short user ID derived from the user's principal.
frontend/src/hooks/usePostToYouTube.ts: Mutation hook that posts a clip to YouTube via the backend actor, first verifying channel connection and enforcing a 30-second timeout, then showing toast notifications on success or failure.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for fetching/saving the caller's user profile and storing Google OAuth credentials via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useScheduledUploads.t: Hooks for querying, adding, and deleting scheduled video uploads via the backend actor, with toast notifications and query cache invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useSendAdminMessage.t: Mutation hook that sends an admin message from the current user to a recipient principal via the backend actor, invalidating activity log queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSetUserRole.ts: Mutation hook that updates a user's role via the backend actor and invalidates related role/owner queries, showing a toast on completion.
frontend/src/hooks/useSetUserStatus.ts: Mutation hook that updates a user's status via the backend actor and invalidates related user/profile queries, showing a toast on completion.
frontend/src/hooks/useSystemStatus.ts: React Query hook that polls the backend for the current system status every 10 seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useTrendingClips.ts: React Query hook that fetches trending video clips from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserRoles.ts: React Query hook that fetches all user roles from the backend and enriches each entry with the user's profile and status.
frontend/src/hooks/useYouTubeChannel.ts: Hook that queries YouTube channel connection status from the backend and provides a mutation to initiate Google OAuth flow by redirecting to the authorization URL.
Utility hook exposing functions to validate a YouTube URL format and extract the video ID from it.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and Tailwind, defining dark-mode CSS custom properties (colors, radius, charts), and utility component classes like glass cards and custom scrollbars.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers wrapping the root `App` component.
frontend/src/pages/ContentManager.tsx: Admin/owner-only page for managing content entries with full CRUD operations (create, edit, delete) using React Query mutations and a dialog-based UI.
frontend/src/pages/MessagesPage.tsx: Page that displays the authenticated user's messages; shows a login prompt if the user is not authenticated via Internet Identity.
frontend/src/pages/MyClipsPage.tsx: Simple page that renders the user's saved clips by wrapping the ClipList component with a header.
frontend/src/pages/OAuthCallback.tsx: Handles the Google OAuth redirect by extracting the authorization code, storing credentials via the backend actor, invalidating relevant queries, and redirecting home on success or error.
frontend/src/pages/Scheduler.tsx: Page for scheduling video clip uploads to YouTube, allowing users to select a clip and date/time, view scheduled uploads, and delete them, with YouTube channel connection status gating.
frontend/src/pages/TrendingPage.tsx: Displays a ranked list of trending video clips sorted by viral score, with special styling for the top 3 entries and loading/empty states.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to remove parameters from the URL hash.
frontend/src/utils/userIdGenerator.ts: Generates a deterministic 8-character alphanumeric user ID from a principal string using a simple 32-bit hash converted to base36.
frontend/src/utils/youtubeOAuthDebug.ts: Provides a `YouTubeOAuthDebugger` class with methods to log and validate each step of the YouTube OAuth flow (initiation, callback, token validation, backend calls). Also includes helpers to detect common OAuth errors and suggest fixes.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a dark-themed design system with custom oklch-based color palettes (primary/indigo, muted, card, etc.), glass-effect shadows, custom fonts, and keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state for 'Beast Clipping', listing known issues (YouTube connection status display, broken downloads), existing fix features, and new feature requests such as showing principal IDs in the admin panel.
